title: HOZELOCK - Hose Connector Plus ø 12.5- 15mm (1/2- 5/8") Soft Touch: Watertight, Non-slip, Flexible Hose-tail Prevents Twisting, Swelling and Leaks [2070 0000], Yellow/Grey
